meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template to overcome scaling bottlenecks. An advanced-level guide for students using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scaling bottlenecks by enforcing a modular, decoupled architecture from day one. By leveraging Claude Code to automate boilerplate and dependency injection, you transform stagnant prototypes into production-ready SaaS applications. This methodology ensures your code remains maintainable, testable, and infinitely extensible as your project grows.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a codebase that has become a tangled web of spaghetti code. Your MVP worked, but as soon as you tried to add a second feature, the entire foundation cracked under the weight of poor structure. This is the 'scaling wall' that separates hobbyists from professional software engineers.

But the wall isn't made of your lack of skill; it's made of your lack of architecture. Enter the Antigravity project template—a blueprint designed to decouple your logic, manage state with precision, and automate the tedious plumbing that kills momentum. By pairing this with Claude Code, you shift from manual coding to architectural orchestration.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Set up the core project structure to ensure separation of concerns between your API, data models, and UI components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard architecture: separate the /core, /services, and /ui layers with strict dependency injection rules.

steps.title: Define Domain-Driven Entities
steps.description: Establish your data models to prevent logic leakage into your presentation layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate domain entities for a SaaS project including User, Workspace, and Subscription, using the Antigravity data-schema pattern.

steps.title: Implement Decoupled Service Layers
steps.description: Move business logic out of your UI components into isolated service classes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for authentication and billing that communicates via the Antigravity event bus.

steps.title: Automate API Contract Generation
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend stay in sync without manual typing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate typesafe API contracts based on the existing service layer definitions within the Antigravity template.

steps.title: Stress Test with Simulated Load
steps.description: Validate your architecture against concurrent requests to ensure scaling stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a load testing suite using Antigravity's built-in benchmarking tools to verify service responsiveness.

pro_tips: Always treat your configuration as code; store environment-specific variables in a centralized Antigravity secret vault.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode on every pull request to enforce the Antigravity folder structure, preventing architectural drift.
Implement 'Feature Flags' early to decouple deployment from release, allowing you to test in production safely.
Prioritize interface-based programming; if a service is hard to test, your Antigravity dependency injection is likely too tight.
Automate your documentation via Claude Code by pointing it at your service layer definitions to keep your README current with your actual code.
content.next_steps: Once your base architecture is live, begin migrating your existing MVP features one-by-one into the new service layers, ensuring you write unit tests for each module before deployment.
content.conversion_block: Stop building apps that break under pressure and start engineering systems that define your career. You have the tools, the blueprint, and the expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
